text:
(a) The department may issue an inspection station certificate to a decentralized facility authorized and licensed by the department under Section 548.304 (Stations Licensed to Conduct Emissions Inspections) if the facility meets the certification requirements of that section and the department.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B. 3297 ), Sec. 26(5), eff. January 1, 2025.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.3045 — Appointment of Decentralized Facility

(a) The department may issue an inspection station certificate to a decentralized facility authorized and licensed by the department under Section 548.304 (Stations Licensed to Conduct Emissions Inspections) if the facility meets the certification requirements of that section and the department.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B. 3297 ), Sec. 26(5), eff. January 1, 2025.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B.3297), Sec. 26(5), eff. January 1, 2025.*
